diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How may I assist you today?
[Caller] Hi, I need compensation. I missed two days of logins during the outage this week.
[Agent] I can help with that. For security, could you please provide your UID?
[Caller] 832118007.
[Agent] Thank you. And to verify identity, could you confirm the HoYoverse email on file?
[Caller] ytanaka at email dot com.
[Agent] Identity verified. Let me check known incidents for your region. I see incident INC202604161, Asia region, 18 hours of downtime April 16th to April 17th. Your UID starts with 83 which matches the affected range. Per the compensation policy table, the standard compensation for this incident is 300 Primogems.
[Caller] Okay.
[Agent] I am submitting a compensation ticket against INC202604161 now. Ticket ID TK44523. I am also issuing an in-game mail for 300 Primogems. Per policy the mail will remain claimable for 30 days.
[Caller] Got it.
[Agent] The mail should arrive within a few minutes. Is there anything further I can assist with?
[Caller] No, that covers it.
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. Have a good day.
